about.intro: I am an AI Automation Specialist from Hyderabad, India, passionate about building intelligent systems that transform how businesses operate. I specialize in designing and deploying AI chatbots, voice bots, and automation workflows that streamline processes and boost productivity.
about.description: With hands-on experience creating 60+ AI chatbots and 5+ voice bots, I help companies automate customer support, HR operations, and internal workflows. I also manage CRM automations using GoHighLevel, ensuring seamless client interactions. Beyond automation, I create tech content on YouTube and Instagram to help others learn and grow in the AI space.

projects.title: Hospital AI Triage System
projects.problem: Front-desk hospital staff were inundated with non-critical calls during peak hours, creating a backlog for urgent patient inquiries.
projects.hypothesis: Deploying a Voice AI agent that handles triage, standard Q&A, and appointment routing will reduce front-desk call volume.
projects.architecture: Twilio / SIP Voice Input -> Make.com -> LLM Agent with Vector DB -> Output to Epic EHR / Human Transfer.
details: Secured workflow using end-to-end encryption for HIPAA compliance.
Custom built memory buffers to handle multi-turn conversational delays.
Integrated automated SMS follow-ups post-call using GoHighLevel.
ai_safety: Strict fallback routing to human agents when patient distress language is detected.
Guardrails to prevent the AI from offering medical diagnoses.
outcome: Handled 4,500+ calls per month without human intervention.
Decreased patient hold times from 8 minutes to 30 seconds.

projects.title: B2B Sales Outreach Automation
projects.problem: Sales reps were spending 15 hours a week manually drafting and personalizing cold outreach sequences.
projects.hypothesis: Building an autonomous system to scrape prospect data and generate contextualized outreach emails will increase response and meeting booked rates.
projects.architecture: Lead Form -> n8n Workflow -> Web Scraper (Apify) -> Claude 3.5 Sonnet -> GoHighLevel Mail Sequence.
details: Built an n8n webhook listener for incoming lead prospects.
Implemented dynamic prompt templates injecting company news and LinkedIn profile data.
Created GoHighLevel sub-accounts with A/B testing variations for different industries.
ai_safety: Human-in-the-loop review queue for any high-value enterprise targets.
Filtered list for toxic/competitor domains to prevent outreach mistakes.
outcome: Reps reclaimed 15 hours/week for actual closing conversations.
Open rates improved to 65% and reply rates jumped to 14%.

projects.title: Internal Document Q&A Knowledge Base
projects.impact: Reduced employee training time by 3 weeks
projects.problem: Onboarding new hires took weeks due to scattered company documentation across Confluence, Google Drive, and Notion.
projects.hypothesis: A centralized chatbot utilizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) will provide instant, accurate answers and halve onboarding times.
projects.architecture: User Chat Interface -> API -> Embedding Model -> Pinecone Vector Database -> LLM Synthesis -> User Answer.
details: Built automated ETL pipelines to sync document stores with vector database nightly.
Implemented access controls ensuring users could only retrieve data they have permission to access.
Generated conversational citations linking back to original sources.
ai_safety: Strict prompt engineering against hallucinations by restricting answers to provided context.
Logging of failed queries to continuously monitor knowledge gaps.
outcome: Over 80% of internal HR queries handled instantly by the bot.
Search time for internal processes reduced to near 0.

projects.title: E-Commerce Customer Support Bot
projects.problem: During holidays, support tickets for order status and returns spiked, overwhelming the support team.
projects.hypothesis: Deploying an API-connected assistant on Shopify can instantly resolve routine WISMO (Where is my order?) and return requests.
projects.architecture: Website Chat Widget -> Dialogflow / Botpress -> Custom Webhooks -> Shopify API & Shippo API.
details: Developed NLP flows for order lookup, return processing, and product recommendations.
Connected to Shopify REST Admin API to dynamically pull tracking numbers and shipping states.
Implemented fallback to Zendesk live agents for complex, non-standard cases.
ai_safety: PII masking applied before any query hits LLMs.
Hard limits on coupon generation to prevent abuse.
outcome: Support team successfully weathered a 300% holiday traffic spike with no new hires.
Maintained a 4.5/5 CSAT rating for automated interactions.
